content.title: Focus Mode Core Engine

userStory.iWant: to activate a focus mode that filters my view to only the current task
userStory.soThat: I can work without distraction for extended periods

acceptanceCriteria.then: the UI shows only my current task, related context, and a focus timer
it is queued and batched for delivery when focus ends (unless P0 urgent)

acceptanceCriteria.given: focus mode is active for 25 minutes
acceptanceCriteria.then: a gentle notification suggests a 5-minute break (Pomodoro-style)

implementationDetails: Focus state machine: idle -> focusing -> break -> focusing (loop) -> ended
Notification interceptor middleware that checks focus state before delivery
Focus session events published for analytics and Slack DND sync
